_comment: Seeded snapshot for offline demo mode. Mirrors the Episode 8 smoke-test: row counts reflect row-level security depth, and the secured columns (lc_blockerreason, lc_risksummary) are null for personas outside the 'lc Sensitive Readers' field security profile, which the app renders as a masked block.

me.lc_blockerreason: Finance needs signoff on the EU VAT model before tiers can publish.
me.lc_risksummary: High: pricing unresolved 9 days before GA; two downstream tasks blocked.

me.lc_blockerreason: Awaiting legal review of the German and Japanese strings.

policies._comment: Seeded to mirror the live Product Launch 2.0 security model: four lc roles bound 1:1 to owner-teams, and the 'Custom Column security' field security profile over lc_teammember.lc_email (Email_HideName) with no members assigned, so only System Administrators read it today.

roles.name: lc Admin
roles.privileges: Create, Read, Write, Delete, Append, AppendTo, Assign, Share

roles.name: lc Owner
roles.privileges: Create, Read, Write, Delete, Append, AppendTo, Assign, Share

profiles.name: Custom Column security
profiles.description: Secures the team-member email column behind a hide-name mask.

profiles.name: lc Sensitive Readers
profiles.description: Demo profile: who may read the sensitive launch reasoning columns.
